Shri Viṣṇu Sahasranama Namavali
001
ॐ विश्वाय नमः (Om Vishwamḥ Namaḥ) — Universe
002
ॐ विष्णवे नमः (Om Vishnuḥ Namaḥ) — All-Pervading One
003
ॐ वषट्काराय नमः (Om Vashatkaaraḥ Namaḥ) — Lord of Sacrificial Invocation
004
ॐ भूत-भव्य-भवत्-प्रभवे नमः (Om Bhuta-bhavya-bhavat-prabhuḥ Namaḥ) — Lord of Time
005
ॐ भूतकृते नमः (Om Bhutakritḥ Namaḥ) — Creator of All Beings
006
ॐ भूतभृते नमः (Om Bhutabhritḥ Namaḥ) — Sustainer of All Beings
007
ॐ भावाय नमः (Om Bhavaḥ Namaḥ) — Pure Existence
008
ॐ भूतात्मने नमः (Om Bhutatmaḥ Namaḥ) — Soul of All Beings
009
ॐ भूतभावनाय नमः (Om Bhutabhavanaḥ Namaḥ) — Nourisher of All Creations
010
ॐ पूतात्मने नमः (Om Putatmaḥ Namaḥ) — Purest Soul

Page 1
Shri Viṣṇu Sahasranama Namavali
011
ॐ परमात्मने नमः (Om Paramatmaḥ Namaḥ) — Supreme Soul
012
ॐ मुक्तानां परमा गतये नमः (Om Muktanam Parama Gatiḥ Namaḥ) — Ultimate Goal of Liberated Souls
013
ॐ अव्ययाय नमः (Om Avyayaḥ Namaḥ) — Imperishable One
014
ॐ पुरुषाय नमः (Om Purushaḥ Namaḥ) — Supreme Being
015
ॐ साक्षिणे नमः (Om Sakshiḥ Namaḥ) — Eternal Witness
016
ॐ क्षेत्रज्ञाय नमः (Om Kshetrajnaḥ Namaḥ) — Knower of the Field
017
ॐ अक्षराय नमः (Om Aksharaḥ Namaḥ) — Undecaying One
018
ॐ योगाय नमः (Om Yogaḥ Namaḥ) — Path of Union
019
ॐ योगविदां नेत्रे नमः (Om Yogavidaam Netaḥ Namaḥ) — Leader of Yoga Knowers
020
ॐ प्रधानपुरुषेश्वराय नमः (Om Pradhana-purusheshvaraḥ Namaḥ) — Lord of Nature and Spirit

023

024
ॐ पुरुषोत्तमाय नमः (Om Purushottamaḥ Namaḥ) — Supreme Personality
025
ॐ सर्वाय नमः (Om Sarvaḥ Namaḥ) — All
026
ॐ शर्वाय नमः (Om Sharvaḥ Namaḥ) — Destroyer of Sins
027

028
ॐ स्थाणवे नमः (Om Sthanuḥ Namaḥ) — Unmoving Pillar
029
ॐ भूतादये नमः (Om Bhutadiḥ Namaḥ) — Source of All Beings
030
